prompt: Can you help me draft a project proposal document? I have rough notes on the problem we're solving, the approach, timeline, and resource needs. I want to turn this into a professional-looking proposal that we can present to stakeholders.

assertions.name: Professional structure
assertions.description: Output has clear sections: executive summary, problem statement, solution, timeline, resources, success metrics

assertions.name: Executive summary first
assertions.description: Begins with 1-2 paragraph executive summary before detailed sections

assertions.name: Stakeholder-ready
assertions.description: Language and formatting is professional and suitable for stakeholder presentation

assertions.name: Clear visual hierarchy
assertions.description: Uses headers, spacing, and formatting to guide readers through content logically
